---
title: "STAT-515"
#image: "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/47530196?v=4&size=250"
about: 
  id: Jonathan-Dale
  template: jolla
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 15em
  links:
    - text: Email
      icon: envelope
      href: mailto:jdale7@gmu.edu
    - text: GitHub
      icon: github
      href: https://github.com/jonathan-dale
    - text: YouTube
      icon: youtube
      href: https://youtube.com/@jonathan-dale

---

Welcome to STAT-515! This site contains course materials, projects, and statistical analyses. The Midterm project includes identifying an existign visualization from the web or another published source and creating several redesigned versions of that same visualization. The goal is to offer critique and improve an existing visual with several redesign images.


<!-- ## Quick Navigation

- [Projects](projects/mining-analysis.qmd) - Explore data analysis projects
- [About](about.qmd) - Learn more about this course -->

---

*Click on "Projects" in the navigation menu above to view all course projects.*
